This mini Ella Boston bag was born during Munich's Golden Age and is a daily shoulder bag. The leather tag and embossed logo metal lock are inspired by the brand's travel tradition, directly taken from the brand's classic trunks.
Model No.: H082 Mini
Size: 18*9*9.5cm
Strap: Adjustable 97-113cm
Handle: Drop 8cm
Zipper: Two-way full closure zipper
Color: Black Cognac
